methods.name: FixedMap-NDT+ScanContext
methods.note: Fixed-map NDT: target map built once from GT/reference poses (stride=5, map_points=44000). Seed source=scan_context, accepted=98/107, rejected=9, seed fallbacks=66. ScanContext hits=41/107, top_k=10, NDT candidates evaluated=41, mean distance=0.0756.
